# KVitals

> A lightweight KDE Plasma 6 panel widget for live system vitals

KVitals is a lightweight KDE Plasma 6 panel widget that displays live system vitals including CPU usage, memory usage, CPU temperature, network upload/download speeds, and disk read/write speeds directly in your panel. It uses a shell script backend with automatic network interface detection and is fully configurable through a settings UI.


## Getting started

- [Home](https://yassine20011.github.io/kvitals/index.md): Overview and features of KVitals
- [Installation](https://yassine20011.github.io/kvitals/installation/index.md): How to install KVitals on KDE Plasma 6
- [Configuration](https://yassine20011.github.io/kvitals/configuration/index.md): Widget settings and customization options

## Technical reference

- [Architecture](https://yassine20011.github.io/kvitals/architecture/index.md): System architecture, data flow, and component design
- [Troubleshooting](https://yassine20011.github.io/kvitals/troubleshooting/index.md): Common issues and solutions
